en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Commercial Register extract in the Czech Republic Trade Licensing Commercial Register Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t

Czech companies and branches must be listed in the Commercial Register under Act No. 304/2013 Coll., §25–26. A Czech Commercial Register extract can be obtained online from the Ministry of Justice or as an official certified extract via Czech POINT and courts.
Please upload a current Commercial Register extract issued within the last 90 days.
